subject: Fwd: 4 star hanger
body:

**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)


From: LVJET@aol.com
Subject: 4 star hanger
Date: Mon, 16 Jun 2008 16:07:33 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Darren,
Je ask to get the best deal for both heli's for hanger in STT. At this time  
its $3,000 for S76 and $1,000 for Bell 407, including "ALL" the office  space 
on East side of hanger. Jim Herron (Chief Pilot for 4 Star), asked that we  
provide a letter of commitment by Thursday that we intend to place at least the  
Bell 407 in their hanger starting July 1st. and will have space for the S76 
if  we bring it to STT.
According to JE, via the Governor, 4 Star has not signed the lease, I'm  
guessing they will use our letter against us to block them loosing their lease.  
They intend to have our Bell 407 and S76 plus one other tenant, Dr. Shapero  
who owns a Cessna 337 aircraft.
According to Nicolas at Air Center, if Stewart Diamond loose's the  lease, he 
will tie this up in court since he conceders this hanger  space a valuable 
commodity and does not want to release his hold.
please advise JE
I will stand by until I hear from you.
Larry v



**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)

From:LVJET@aol.com
Subject:4 star hanger
Date:Mon, 16 Jun 2008 16:07:33 GMT
To:DKIESQ@aol.com

Darren,
Je ask to get the best deal for both heli's for hanger in STT. At this time its $3,000 for S76 and $1,000 for Bell 407, including "ALL" the office space on East side of hanger. Jim Herron (Chief Pilot for 4 Star), asked that we provide a letter of commitment by Thursday that we intend to place at least the Bell 407 in their hanger starting July 1st. and will have space for the S76 if we bring it to STT.
According to JE, via the Governor, 4 Star has not signed the lease, I'm guessing they will use our letter against us to block them loosing their lease. They intend to have our Bell 407 and S76 plus one other tenant, Dr. Shapero who owns a Cessna 337 aircraft.
According to Nicolas at Air Center, if Stewart Diamond loose's the lease, he will tie this up in court since he conceders this hanger space a valuable commodity and does not want to release his hold.
please advise JE
I will stand by until I hear from you.
Larry v
